definitions.text: An opening, usually covered by one or more panes of clear glass, to allow light and air from outside to enter a building or vehicle.
examples: She opened the window to let some air in.

definitions.text: An opening, usually covered by glass, in a shop which allows people to view the shop and its products from outside; a shop window.
The shutter, casement, sash with its fittings, or other framework, which closes a window opening.
To place at or in a window.
To apply a window function to (a signal).
